operator: HipKittens SharedKV backward latent-dKV epilogue fork

mode_3_block_cull_only.description: Returns early only if the whole four-warp resident compressed-tile CTA has no active sidecar tile. Final stores are not individually gated by sidecar.

active_tiles_1.note: One active warp keeps the whole four-warp CTA alive, so active_tiles_1 matches active_tiles_4.

mode_4_block_cull_plus_warp_store_gate.description: Returns early for all-inactive CTAs and gates final dOriKV/dCmpKV stores per resident warp/tile. QK/P/dP/dQ math is still computed for active CTAs, so this is an epilogue-only route gate, not exact sparse-softmax correctness.

mode_5_block_cull_plus_warp_store_and_dq.description: Returns early for all-inactive CTAs, gates final dOriKV/dCmpKV stores per resident warp/tile, and also gates the final dQ atomic for inactive resident tiles. The QK/P/dP producer math still runs for active CTAs.

contamination_note: An earlier query_chunks=16 active_tiles_1/8 timing pair was launched in parallel on the same GPU and discarded. Only sequential reruns are recorded above.
decision: reject epilogue-only route culling as a C4 SharedKV latency lever for this HipKittens fork
read: The compact route sidecar can gate outputs and all-inactive CTAs cheaply, but any remaining active resident tile still executes the long query-sweep body. Therefore latency stays around 4.37-4.52 ms for D128 even when dCmpKV writes shrink by 2x-16x. Gating dQ atomics as well does not move the wall. The route mask has to enter before the QK/P/dP/dQ and dCmpKV accumulation work, not only at final stores.
next_gate: move route masking into the producer math: zero or skip P/dP contributions before dV/dK/dQ accumulation, or write a new source-boundary owner whose compressed-group route is part of the score/prob tile rather than a late epilogue.
